summary: Completed Iteration 6 testing of MemoraAI visual redesign. All frontend features verified: Yellow/amber theme across entire app, new landing page with WhatsApp automation focus, 7 industry categories with WhatsApp CTA buttons, Related Business Pages section, floating WhatsApp button. All backend APIs working (health, auth, categories). No RealApex text found on landing page.

issues: Login page background still uses blue/cyan gradient (from-blue-50 via-white to-cyan-50) instead of amber/yellow theme. This may be intentional for contrast but differs from the rest of the app's yellow theme.

critical_code_review_comments: Login.js line 218: Background gradient uses blue/cyan colors instead of amber/yellow theme used elsewhere. Consider updating to match the app's yellow theme for consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI Iteration 6 visual redesign testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Yellow/amber theme applied to landing page, dashboard, and logo. 2) New landing page with WhatsApp automation focus - hero section shows 'Turn WhatsApp Into Your Smartest Sales Agent'. 3) 7 industry categories (Real Estate, Astrology, Doctor/Clinic, Function Hall, Pesticides/Fertilizer, Beauty Salon, Coaching Centers) with WhatsApp and Quick Enquiry buttons. 4) 6 feature cards (AI Memory Engine, WhatsApp Automation, Hot Sales Detection, Self-Service WABA, Smart Scheduling, Multi-Tenant SaaS). 5) Related Business Pages section. 6) Floating WhatsApp button. 7) Footer with MemoraAI branding and Eloniot Software Solutions. 8) No RealApex text found. WhatsApp number: 916309356590.
